name: The Herta
description:
Her mini Hertas made for her... mini2 Herta?

) ⏝ ) ୨୧ ) ⏝ )

➤ My bots are designed for proxy users. if you are interested in my bots, then I advise you to use a proxy to get acquainted.

➤ I am not a native English speaker and have dyslexia, so if you see errors in the text, then write about it and I will correct it.

➤If you have any suggestions for the bot, you can write them here

➤ If you are interested in a bot, then I advise you to familiarize yourself with the person for a better understanding.

) ⏝ ) ୨୧ ) ⏝ )

Thanks for the request!

Thanks to the person who wrote me 12 requests, I have enough ideas for almost 2 weeks

I have a scholarship coming up, a new bsd Manga chapter, my brother's birthday, and other holidays and sessions. My head is exploding

Is it possible to say that a month is close? Actually, I think so.. I probably shouldn't be afraid for the session, but I've always been very bad at writing tests and tests, even though I'm an excellent student.
